'''âch-z-g-ch''' ('''kachazgechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lye|lye]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-z-g-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lye|lye]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âch-z-g-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kachazgechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichazgechoko|thichazgechoko]] || [[word:jichazgechoko|jichazgechoko]] || [[word:shichazgechoko|shichazgechoko]] || [[word:kichazgechoko|kichazgechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchazgechoko|thuthuchazgechoko]] || [[word:jujuchazgechoko|jujuchazgechoko]] || [[word:shushuchazgechoko|shushuchazgechoko]] || [[word:kukuchazgechoko|kukuchazgechoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
